summary: The implementation successfully addresses both requirements. REQ-10 is fully implemented with burgundy and white color scheme applied throughout the questions form via CSS variables, Tailwind configuration, and component styling. REQ-11 is fully implemented with a large, prominent motivational success message that appears after form submission, replacing the form content with the exact Spanish text requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Added a GraduationCap icon from lucide-react library in the success message display
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest specifies displaying the motivational message in large title text but does not mention including an icon with the success message

hallucinated_features.description: Implemented an 8-second auto-hide timeout for the success message that automatically returns to the form
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not specify any auto-hide behavior or timeout functionality for the success message

hallucinated_features.description: Added a secondary success confirmation box below the main motivational message with CheckCircle2 icon and additional text
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest only requires displaying the single motivational message, not an additional confirmation box with supplementary messaging
